overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a dark, snowy alien landscape at night. The character walks steadily through the terrain, passing glowing purple crystals and rocky formations under a cloudy sky, approaching distant lights on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open alien snow field with distant crystal formations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the snow toward glowing purple crystals visible in the distance

entered.detail: large rocky mountain formation silhouetted against the dark cloudy sky
tall glowing purple crystalline formation emerging from the snow
flat snow-covered ground extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a vast open snow field under a dark cloudy night sky. In the distance, a purple crystal cluster glows against the backdrop of rocky mountains, serving as a focal point for the character's steady forward movement.

events.description: character turns right to navigate around the purple crystal formation

agents.ego_description: turning right to pass the purple crystals and proceeding toward white glowing rock formations ahead

entered.detail: large white luminescent rock formation visible beyond the purple crystals
massive dark rock outcrop partially covered in snow

segments.scene_description: The character turns right to navigate around the glowing purple crystals, which fall behind and to the left. The camera follows as the character heads toward a white glowing rock formation, with large boulders appearing on the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky snow plateau with scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: walking through rocky terrain passing large boulders and small dark crystal outcrops scattered across the snow

entered.detail: small dark crystalline formations protruding from the snow
faint illuminated structures visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the open plateau, the character passes the white glowing rocks and moves through an area scattered with dark crystal outcrops and large boulders. Distant lights become visible on the horizon, suggesting a settlement ahead.

agents.ego_description: continuing through increasingly rocky terrain toward distant illuminated structures on the horizon

entered.detail: cluster of bright lights indicating buildings or structures in the distance
vertical rock formations rising from the snowy ground

segments.scene_description: In the final stretch, the character traverses rockier terrain with tall pillars and scattered boulders while approaching a distant settlement whose lights grow more prominent. The mountain range remains visible to the left as the character maintains a steady pace toward the illuminated horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a dark, snowy alien plateau that gradually transitions from a desolate wilderness toward a distant, illuminated settlement. It begins with the character walking through a vast open snow field under a cloudy night sky, moving steadily toward a glowing purple crystal cluster set against rocky mountains. As the character turns right to navigate around these crystals, the scene shifts toward a white glowing rock formation flanked by large boulders. The camera then continues across the open plateau, passing dark crystal outcrops and boulders as faint lights first appear on the horizon. Finally, the terrain becomes rockier with tall pillars and scattered boulders, while the distant settlement lights grow more prominent against the backdrop of the mountain range.
